headline: LOWE'S COMPANIES, INC. DECLARES CASH DIVIDEND
summary: The board of directors of Lowe's Companies, Inc. (NYSE: LOW) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of one dollar and 20 cents ($1.20) per share, payable May 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 22, 2026.

headline: January new home sales plunge to the lowest pace since 2022
summary: New home sales fell to the lowest level in four years, despite lower interest rates and builder incentives.

headline: Best Dividend Kings: March 2026
summary: The Dividend Kings outperformed SPY year-to-date, up 2.06% versus SPY's 3.06% loss, despite a March pullback. Check out the list here.

headline: Lowe’s unveils new offering to help homeowners with common headaches
summary: While we all prefer living in a fully equipped home, not everyone has the time, skills, or necessary resources to maintain it in good condition, or repair it if necessary. The Covid lockdowns certainly taught us the importance of keeping our environments comfortable and functional, and ...
